The '''71st annual [[Berlin International Film Festival]]''' took place from 1 to 5 March 2021 as a virtual festival due to the [[COVID-19 pandemic]].<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.visitberlin.de/en/event/71st-international-film-festival-berlin-berlinale |title=71st International Film Festival Berlin - Berlinale |work=visitberlin.de |access-date=2 January 2021}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://variety.com/2020/film/global/berlinale-berlin-film-festival-virtual-postpones-1234851570/ |title=Berlin Film Festival Set to Go Virtual for 71st Edition (EXCLUSIVE)|first=Elsa|last=Keslassy|date=16 December 2020 |work=[[Variety (magazine)|Variety]] |access-date=2 January 2021}}</ref><ref name=roxborough>Scott Roxborough, [https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/news/berlin-film-festival-2021-panorama-lineup "Berlin Film Festival Unveils Panorama, Encounters Titles"]. ''[[The Hollywood Reporter]]'', 10 February 2021.</ref>

Romanian film ''[[Bad Luck Banging or Loony Porn]]'' directed by [[Radu Jude]] won the [[Golden Bear]]. It was the third victory of [[Cinema of Romania|Romania]] in the last nine years.

==Juries==
===Competition===
The following were on the jury for the Berlinale Competition section:<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/news-topics/news/detail_63624.html|title=Golden Bear Winners Form the International Jury of the 71st Berlinale |work=Berlinale |access-date=5 March 2021}}</ref>

* [[Ildikó Enyedi]], Hungarian filmmaker
* [[Nadav Lapid]], Israeli filmmaker
* [[Adina Pintilie]], Romanian filmmaker
* [[Mohammad Rasoulof]], Iranian filmmaker
* [[Gianfranco Rosi (director)|Gianfranco Rosi]], Italian filmmaker
* [[Jasmila Žbanić]], Bosnian filmmaker

===Encounters===
The following people were on the jury for the Encounters Awards:<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/news-topics/news/detail_66509.html|title=Encounters Jury|work=Berlinale|access-date=5 March 2021}}</ref>

* Florence Almozini, French programmer
* Cecilia Barrionuevo, Argentinian artistic director
* [[Diedrich Diederichsen]], German editor and publisher

===International Short Film===
The following people were on the jury for the Berlinale Shorts section:<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/news-topics/news/detail_66508.html|title=The 2021 International Short Film Jury|work=Berlinale|access-date=5 March 2021}}</ref>

* Basim Magdy, Egyptian artist
* Christine A. Maier, Austrian cinematographer
* [[Sebastian Urzendowsky]], German actor

==Competition==
The following films were selected for the main competition for the [[Golden Bear]] and [[Silver Bear]] awards:<ref>{{cite web |url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/news-topics/news/detail_64272.html |title=Competition - Reshaping Cinematic Forms |work=Berlinale |access-date=12 February 2021 |archive-date=12 February 2021 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20210212172333/https://www.berlinale.de/en/news-topics/news/detail_64272.html |url-status=dead }}</ref>

==Official Awards==
===Main Competition===
[[File:Radu Jude - IFFR 2020.jpg|thumb|Romanian director [[Radu Jude]] won the Berlinale's [[Golden Bear]].]]
* [[Golden Bear]]: ''[[Bad Luck Banging or Loony Porn]]'' by [[Radu Jude]]<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/festival/awards-and-juries/international-jury.html|title=The Prizes of the International Jury|work=Berlinale|access-date=20 March 2021}}</ref>
* [[Silver Bear Grand Jury Prize]]: ''[[Wheel of Fortune and Fantasy]]'' by [[Ryusuke Hamaguchi]]
* [[Silver Bear Jury Prize]]: ''Mr. Bachmann and His Class'' by Maria Speth
* [[Silver Bear for Best Director]]: [[Dénes Nagy]] for ''[[Natural Light (film)|Natural Light]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Leading Performance]]: [[Maren Eggert]] for ''[[I'm Your Man (2021 film)|I'm Your Man]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Supporting Performance]]: Lilla Kizlinger for ''[[Forest - I See You Everywhere]]''
* [[Silver Bear for Best Screenplay]]: [[Hong Sang-soo]] for ''[[Introduction (film)|Introduction]]''
* '''Silver Bear for Outstanding Artistic Contribution''': Yibrán Asuad for ''[[A Cop Movie]]'' (editing)

=== Encounters ===
* '''Best Film''': ''We'' by [[Alice Diop]]<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/festival/awards-and-juries/awards-encounters.html|title=Encounters Jury
|work=Berlinale|access-date=20 March 2021}}</ref>
* '''Special Jury Award''': ''[[Taste (film)|Taste]]'' by Lê Bảo
* '''Best Director''': (ex-aequo)
** Ramon Zürcher and Silvan Zürcher for ''[[The Girl and the Spider]]''
** [[Denis Côté]] for ''[[Social Hygiene]]''
** '''Special Mention''': ''Rock Bottom Riser'' by Fern Silva

=== International Short Film ===
* [[Golden Bear for Best Short Film]]: ''My Uncle Tudor'' by Olga Lucovnicova<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/festival/awards-and-juries/international-short-film-jury.html|title=International Short Film Jury|work=Berlinale|access-date=20 March 2021}}</ref>
* '''Silver Bear Jury Prize''': ''Day Is Gone'' by Zhang Dalei
* '''Berlin Short Film Candidate for the''' [[European Film Awards]]: ''Easter Eggs by Nicolas Keppens''

=== Generation ===

==== Kplus competition ====
* '''Grand Prix''': ''Summer Blur'' by Han Shuai<ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.berlinale.de/en/festival/awards-and-juries/awards-generation.html|title=Awards and Juries in the Generation section|work=Berlinale|access-date=20 March 2021}}</ref>
** '''Special Mention''': ''A School in Cerro Hueso'' by Betania Cappato

==== 14plus competition ====
* '''Grand Prix''': ''The Fam'' by Fred Baillif
** '''Special Mention''': ''Cryptozoo'' by Dash Shaw
